# Discussion

## en-US

Use discussions for design questions, roadmap tradeoffs, process analytics patterns, and reusable Power BI expert-replacement ideas.

Recommended structure:

- Context
- Process or expert role affected
- Proposed approach
- Risks or governance concerns
- Decision needed

## de-DE

Nutze Discussions fuer Designfragen, Roadmap-Abwaegungen, Process-Analytics-Patterns und wiederverwendbare Power-BI-Expert-Replacement-Ideen.

Empfohlene Struktur:

- Kontext
- Betroffener Prozess oder Expertenrolle
- Vorgeschlagener Ansatz
- Risiken oder Governance-Themen
- Benoetigte Entscheidung
